content: Tailwind CSS v4 (4.3.2) setup for Next.js: install tailwindcss + @tailwindcss/postcss, create postcss.config.mjs with @tailwindcss/postcss plugin, add single '@import "tailwindcss";' line to app/globals.css. No tailwind.config.js required by default in v4 (CSS-first config via @theme in globals.css), differs from v3's JS config file + content-glob setup.
